source_pr.title: executor/test: fix data race of executor unit tests
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? ``` WARNING: DATA RACE Write at 0x000003136ab0 by goroutine 133: github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor_test.(*testSuite1).TestCoprocessorPriority() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor/executor_test.go:2516 +0x5a6 Previous read at 0x000003136ab0 by goroutine 124: github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor.isPhysicalPlanExpensive() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor/compiler.go:106 +0x3e github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor.isExpensiveQuery() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor/compiler.go:91 +0x326 github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor.logExpensiveQuery() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor/compiler.go:69 +0x5d github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor.(*Compiler).Compile() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor/compiler.go:55 +0x305 github.com/pingcap/tidb/session.(*session).execute() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/session/session.go:907 +0x9f7 github.com/pingcap/tidb/session.(*session).Execute() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/session/session.go:869 +0xd4 github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl/util.CompleteDeleteRange() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl/util/util.go:106 +0x18e github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl.(*delRange).doTask() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl/delete_range.go:187 +0x443 WARNING: DATA RACE Write at 0x000002e8c346 by goroutine 231: github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor_test.(*testSuite1).TestMergeJoin() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor/merge_join_test.go:305 +0xec0 Previous read at 0x000002e8c346 by goroutine 178: github.com/pingcap/tidb/planner/core.DoOptimize() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/planner/core/optimizer.go:101 +0x87 github.com/pingcap/tidb/planner.Optimize() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/planner/optimize.go:68 +0x462 github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor.(*Compiler).Compile() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor/compiler.go:49 +0x22c github.com/pingcap/tidb/session.(*session).execute() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/session/session.go:907 +0x9f7 github.com/pingcap/tidb/session.(*session).Execute() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/session/session.go:869 +0xd4 github.com/pingcap/tidb/session.execRestrictedSQL() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/session/session.go:659 +0xaf github.com/pingcap/tidb/session.(*session).ExecRestrictedSQL() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/session/session.go:618 +0x199 github.com/pingcap/tidb/session.(*session).loadCommonGlobalVariablesIfNeeded() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/session/session.go:1452 +0x7ec github.com/pingcap/tidb/session.(*session).execute() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/session/session.go:879 +0xe0 github.com/pingcap/tidb/session.(*session).Execute() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/session/session.go:869 +0xd4 github.com/pingcap/tidb/util/testkit.(*TestKit).Exec() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/util/testkit/testkit.go:137 +0xff github.com/pingcap/tidb/util/testkit.(*TestKit).MustExec() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/util/testkit/testkit.go:171 +0x94 github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor_test.(*testSuite).TearDownTest() /home/jenkins/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor/executor_test.go:132 +0xdd ``` ### What is changed and how it works? Some global variables would be modified in unit test, for example, `TestCoprocessorPriority` would modify global variable `ExpensiveThreshold`, so making these tests being executed sequentially can avoid data race between test suites running in parallel, but data race still exists between current running test and background `delRange` goroutine like the above stack, to solve this issue completely, we should make all these global variables atomic, but currently, these values are only written during bootstrap from configuration file, so the data race can only happen in unit test environment. Considered that we merely met these data races before when unit tests are run sequentially, I prefer just making these tests being executed sequentially, because IMO atomic type is too expensive if it is just for unit test. ### Check List Tests - Unit test Code changes N/A Side effects N/A Related changes N/A --- This change is [](https://reviewable.io/reviews/pingcap/tidb/8807)

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: executor/test: fix data race of executor unit tests.
